task: I need to write a short reply to a contractor about a repair estimate, and I don’t want it to sound too stiff or too chatty. Can you help me draft something plain and professional, with a couple of versions if one is firmer than the other?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two plain, professional options you can send.

**Version 1: neutral**
> Hi [Name],  
> Thanks for sending the estimate. I’ve reviewed it and I’m following up with a few questions before I decide how to proceed. Please let me know when you’re available to discuss.  
> Thanks,  
> [Your Name]

**Version 2: firmer**
> Hi [Name],  
> Thanks for the estimate. I’ve reviewed it, and before I move forward I need a clearer breakdown of the work and costs. Please reply in writing with any details that should be clarified.  
> Thanks,  
> [Your Name]

If you want, I can also make them:
- a little warmer,
- more direct,
- or tailored to **accepting**, **delaying**, or **disputing** the estimate.

user_simulator.text:
That’s close. I’d want them a little less chatty, and not all that “Thanks” twice. Plain is better.

Give me versions that sound more like I’m just handling business — one neutral, one firmer. And make them a little shorter.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely. Here are shorter, plainer versions:

**Neutral**
> Hi [Name],  
> I reviewed the estimate and have a few questions before I decide how to proceed. Please let me know when you’re available.  
> [Your Name]

**Firmer**
> Hi [Name],  
> I reviewed the estimate. Before I move forward, I need a clearer breakdown of the work and costs. Please reply in writing.  
> [Your Name]

If you want, I can make either one:
- even shorter,
- more direct,
- or better for **accepting**, **delaying**, or **questioning** the estimate.

user_simulator.text:
Yes, that’s better. Plain is fine.

Neutral:
> Hi [Name],
> I reviewed the estimate and have a few questions before I decide how to proceed. Let me know when you’re available.
> [Your Name]

Firmer:
> Hi [Name],
> I reviewed the estimate. Before I move forward, I need a clearer breakdown of the work and costs. Please reply in writing.
> [Your Name]
